header.title: Registration Form Builder
header.description: Add, remove, and reorder fields in the user registration form. Changes are saved automatically.
header.exportHint: Download the saved form as a template zip — includes all fields and restrictions, plus every image and media link
header.printHint: Open a learner-view preview of the whole form, ready to save as PDF

exportDirtyConfirm: You have unsaved changes. The export contains the last SAVED version — export anyway?

toast.exported: Template exported — images and links are in the zip
toast.exportFailed: Could not export the form. Please try again.

confirmRemove: Remove this field from the registration form?

numeric.title: Numerical settings
numeric.hint: Values outside the range are still saved but flagged red to the learner and admin after they submit.
